name: get_gcc_versions
short_description: Get supported GCC version(s) for the specified simulator
full_help:
get_gcc_versions

Description: 
Get supported GCC version(s) for the specified simulator

Syntax: 
get_gcc_versions  [-quiet] [-verbose] [<name>]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<name>]    Simulator name

Categories: 
ToolLaunch, Simulation

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
